rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: WMIC Unusual Module Loads (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: WMIC Unusual Module Loads (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: 674d5957-41a2-47df-ad91-1833379632a6
status: experimental
description: Detects the wmic process module loads potentially to perform application
  control bypasses. Part of the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/windows-management-instrumentation/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1047
logsource:
  category: image_load
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \wmic.exe
    ImageLoaded|endswith:
    - \jscript.dll
    - \vbscript.dll
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
